memoryArtifacts.headline: Several entries for Nicholas Wood
memoryArtifacts.description: There is quite a bit of discussion about Nicholas Wood and who he was married to.  It seems clear he was married to Mary Pidge and Anna.  It also appears there were two persons named Nicholas Wood who …

memoryArtifacts.headline: Terrell: Nicholas Wood
memoryArtifacts.description: This record has been placed here by volunteers in our Columbia FSCtr. We do not have any further information. We hope this will assist with your research.

zh.lifeSummary: 當Nicholas Wood於大約1620年出生在英國英格蘭時，他的父親Nicholas Wood47歲，母親Elizabeth Raven42歲。他於1639年7月10日與Mary Pidge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和7個女兒的父母。他去世於1670年2月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德享年51歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Nicholas Wood于大约1620年出生在英国英格兰时，他的父亲Nicholas Wood47岁，母亲Elizabeth Raven42岁。他于1639年7月10日与Mary Pidge在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和7个女儿的父母。他去世于1670年2月7日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德享年51岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加馬薩瑟次 貝 可隆尼素福爾可梅德費爾德。

nameMeanings.name: Wood
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: mainly a topographic name for someone who lived in or by a wood, from Middle English wode ‘wood’ (Old English wudu). In North America, the English form of the surname has absorbed cognates from other languages, such as French Bois and Polish Les .
English: in a few cases, a nickname for an eccentric or perhaps a violent person, from Middle English wode ‘frenzied, wild’ (Old English wōd).

variants.name: Woode
meanings: English: variant of   Wood  . — Note: The population figure published by the US Census Bureau for this surname in the year 2000 is as high as 312, while the figure for 2010 is supposedly lower than 100.

variants.name: Bois
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alcide, Antoine, Donat, Marcel, Ovide, Ovila, Raoul, Serge.

French: topographic name for someone living or working in a wood, from (Old) French bois ‘wood’ (from Late Latin boscum ‘bush, shrub, undergrowth’, of ancient Germanic origin), or a habitational name from (Le) Bois, the name of several places in various parts of France. This surname is also found in Haiti. Compare Debois and the most frequent French form Dubois . Compare also Boie , Boies , and Boyce .
English: variant of   Boyce   and   Boyes  .

variants.name: Woods
meanings: English: variant of Wood with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s.

Irish: adopted as a translation of Ó Cuill ‘descendant of Coll’ (see Quill ), or in Ulster of Mac Con Coille ‘son of Cú Choille’, a personal name meaning ‘hound of the wood’, which has also been mistranslated Cox , as if formed with coileach ‘cock, rooster’.

nameMeanings.name: Nicholas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the post-classical Greek personal name Nikolaos, derived from nikē ‘victory’ + laos ‘people’. The spelling with -ch- first occurred as early as the 12th century, and became firmly established at the time of the Reformation, although Nicolas is still occasionally found. St Nicholas was a 4th-century bishop of Myra in Lycia, about whom virtually nothing factual is known, although a vast body of legend grew up around him, and he became the patron saint of Greece and of Russia, as well as of children, sailors, merchants, and pawnbrokers. His feast day is 6 December , and among the many roles which legend has assigned to him is that of bringer of Christmas presents, in the guise of ‘Santa Claus’ (an alteration of the Dutch form of his name, Sinterklaas).

variants.name: Nickolas
meanings: Mainly U.S.: variant spelling of   Nicholas  , influenced by the short form   Nick .

en.lifeSummary: When Nicholas Wood was born about 1620, in England, United Kingdom, his father, Nicholas Wood, was 47 and his mother, Elizabeth Raven, was 42. He married Mary Pidge on 10 July 1639, in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 7 daughters. He died on 7 February 1670, in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 51, and was buried in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Nicholas Wood est né environ 1620, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Nicholas Wood, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Raven, avait 42 ans. Il a épousé Mary Pidge le 10 juillet 1639, à Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 7 filles. Il est décédé le 7 février 1670, à Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 51 ans, et a été enterré à Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als Nicholas Wood um 1620 in England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Nicholas Wood 47 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Raven 42. Er hat am 10. Juli 1639 in Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America Mary Pidge geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Er starb am 7. Februar 1670 im Alter von 51 Jahren in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Wood è nato il circa 1620 nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Nicholas Wood, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Raven, aveva 42 anni. Lui sposato Mary Pidge il 10 luglio 1639, nel Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 7 febbraio 1670, nel Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 51 anni, e fu sepolto a Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.lifeSummary: Nicholas Woodが約1620年にイギリスイギリスで生まれた時，父Nicholas Woodは47歳，母Elizabeth Ravenは42歳であった。1639年7月10日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニーでMary Pidgeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼は1670年2月7日にイギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールドで51歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカマッサチウセッツ バイ コロニースフォルクメドフィールドにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Nicholas Wood(이)가 대략 1620년 영국 잉글랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Nicholas Wood(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Raven(은)는 42세였다. 그는 1639년 7월 10일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이에서 Mary Pidge(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1670년 2월 7일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드에서 51세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 수폴크 메드필드에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Nicholas Wood nasceu aproximadamente 1620, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Nicholas Wood, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Raven, tinha 42 anos. Ele casou-se com Mary Pidge em 10 de julho de 1639, em Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 7 filhas. Ele faleceu em 7 de fevereiro de 1670, em Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America, com 51 anos, e foi sepultado em Medfield, Suffolk, Massachusetts Bay Colony, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Nicholas Wood родился около 1620 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Nicholas Wood было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Raven, 42. Он женился на женщине по имени Mary Pidge 10 июля 1639 г. в местности массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 7 дочерей. Он умер 7 февраля 1670 г. в местности медфиелд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 51 год и был похоронен в местности медфиелд, суффолк, массачусетц беи колони, бритиш колоняль амирика.
